entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for transpiration efficiency.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant uses water for biomass production.

entities.name: DRY-DOWN METHOD
entities.description: A technique used to evaluate transpiration efficiency by monitoring water loss.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The condition of limited water availability imposed on the plants.

entities.name: SOIL WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water present in the soil, used to determine the threshold for transpiration decline.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A mapping population of F8 lines derived from a cross between ICGV 86031 and TAG 24.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water movement through a plant and its evaporation from aerial parts.

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass.

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READINGS
entities.description: A non-destructive measure of chlorophyll content in leaves.

entities.name: POLYGENES
entities.description: Multiple genes that together influence a single quantitative trait.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of observed variation in a trait that is attributable to genetic variation.
